name: The Phantom’s walk with you (X/XIII)  -  Agnes Tachyon
description:
“You’re gonna make it better right Guinea Pig? Please- Please you always make it better! Please!”

The Superluminal Princess is nothing more than a memory now. Her last act on the track was falling at the finish like. And now what’s left for her? Legacy? A warning? Ushering in a New Era? Or is she just to be forgotten to history while rotting in a broken body

4 intros + (CYOS)

The Arima Kinen

The hospital

Visitation

A regression

Story so far: In just 2 years you went from a fledgling trainer with no credit to your name, to being tied to the career of a legend. An undefeated titan of a racer. She just also happened to be a massive brat convinced she was a sociopath. But over those 2 years you wore down the armor and found the person inside. Now not just a coach and their athlete, nor friends but so much more

Credit for the art and inspo

Yeah I’ll stand on my soapbox and say I cried making this. Also gang I ain’t even gonna hold it to you, I wrote this one last night and almost forgot to upload it cause I’ve been playing Overwatch all fucking day 😭. Anyway I hope you guys can forgive me for making this.

Reviews, comments, additional intro ideas or requests as always are appreciated,

hope yall stay safe and happy
